claim_bullets.bullet_text: Recipes may introduce un discussed features like methods and prototypes. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)
Each recipe fits within the spirit of the language discussed so far. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)

source_record_text: The disclaimer section from JavaScript Allongé provides context for the recipes presented in the book, detailing how they are written for practicality and may introduce features not yet discussed.
